summary: Comprehensive testing of ORBITRADE binary options trading platform completed successfully. Backend APIs show 97% success rate (32/33 tests passed). Frontend testing confirms all major features working including landing page, authentication with slide-to-verify, dashboard with trading interface, live price feeds, and admin panel access.

minor_bugs.issue: Trade placement fails with 'Insufficient balance' for new test user
minor_bugs.impact: Expected behavior - new users start with $0 balance
minor_bugs.note: Master user account has $50,000 balance and can trade successfully

working_endpoints: Market data (assets, prices, forex, crypto, metals)
Platform settings and win rate control

minor_issues.impact: Does not affect functionality - real-time features still work

working_features: Landing page with price ticker and CTA buttons

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with ORBITRADE branding
Price ticker displays live forex/crypto/metals prices
CTA buttons ('Start Trading Now' and demo account) functional
Navigation to auth page works
Login form with admin@orbitrade.live credentials works
Slide-to-verify component completes successfully
Dashboard loads after successful login
Trading interface displays with BUY/SELL buttons
Price feeds show live data (EUR/USD, BTC/USD, etc.)
Charts display correctly with candlestick data
Trade amount input accepts values
Asset selection works (forex, crypto, metals categories)
Admin panel accessible with full management interface
Backend APIs: 32/33 endpoints working (97% success rate)
Authentication endpoints working for both admin and master user
Market data APIs returning live price feeds
Admin features (stats, user management, deposits) working
Affiliate system and commission structure working
Password reset flow functional
Platform settings and win rate control working
